title: Dry Dense Croatian White Cabbage Dumplings
description: Smoky and fluffy Croatian dish featuring white cabbage, these dumplings are a show-off dish that is both kosher-friendly and delicious. They are made with a combination of ingredients that give them a unique flavor and texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, flour, eggs, salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for about 5 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown.
Remove the dumplings from the skillet and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite toppings or sides.
